subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Thy recent letter, dated the sixteenth of Jamádíyu'th-Thání '24, hath been received. From its perusal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء تحریر اخیر مورخ به شانزدهم جمادی الثانی ۲۴ واصل گردید از تلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
